svg.text: Pendulum saddle: exact separatrix vs linear tangent
The upright pendulum is still a saddle, but its invariant set is an energy contour, not a pair of straight global eigenlines.
Full pendulum portrait with the exact separatrix
Closed oscillations sit below the energy barrier. The orange curve is the barrier itself.

text.tspan: Orange is exact. Blue is the
branch leaves with the same slope
Exact barrier: H(θ, ω) = 1 - cos θ +
For the sampled positive branch, the
linear line overshoots the exact branch by
1.142 in ω by the time |φ| reaches π.
The CSV sidecar and notebook keep the full
error table; the figure only needs the
